title: Don't Die Without Telling Me Where You're Going
original_title: No te mueras sin decirme adónde vas
overview: A lonely film projectionist through a series of odd events, discovers that he is the reincarnation of one of the inventors of cinema, and that a woman he sees in his dreams is his eternal companion on a trip through centuries.
